full_prompt:
Companies — General Ledger (Q1 Scenario)

Complete the following accounts in the General Ledger of Nyala Ltd for the year ended 2024 December 31:
- Ordinary Share Capital
- Retained Income
- SARS (Income tax)
- Shareholders for Dividends
- Appropriation Account

INFORMATION:
Opening balances on 2024 Jan 1:
- Ordinary share capital: R1590000.00
- Retained income: R530000.00
- SARS (Income tax) (Cr): R30000.00
- Shareholders for dividends: R184800.00

Transactions during 2024:
- Paid the opening balances owing to SARS and shareholders by EFT.
- Provisional tax payments: R160000.00 and R194000.00
- Interim dividends declared and paid: R148500.00
- Repurchased 30000 ordinary shares at R6.30 each
- Issued 80000 ordinary shares at R6.50 each
- Final dividend declared at year-end: 60 cents per share
- Net profit before tax: R900000.00; income tax at 28%
